<?php /** * ASN.1 Raw Element * * PHP version 5 * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> * @copyright 2012 Jim Wigginton * @license http://www.opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.html MIT License * @link http://phpseclib.sourceforge.net */ namespace phpseclib3\File\ASN1; /** * ASN.1 Raw Element * * An ASN.1 ANY mapping will return an ASN1\Element object. Use of this object * will also bypass the normal encoding rules in ASN1::encodeDER() * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> */ class Element { /** * Raw element value * * @var string */ public $element; /** * Constructor * * @param string $encoded * @return Element */ public function __construct($encoded) { $this->element = $encoded; } }
